active.interpretation: Pluto retrograde turns attention inward so you can reset power habits and release outdated control patterns.

upcoming.interpretation: Mercury retrograde slows communication and schedules. Double-check travel, plans, and important messages.
Neptune retrograde clears illusion and asks for honest spiritual alignment.
Saturn retrograde is a checkpoint for discipline, structure, and long-term commitments.
Jupiter retrograde helps reframe growth and focus on quality over speed.
